posts.title: Welcome To The Suno Blog
posts.summary: A starter post for the new blog site that will eventually feature your Suno song videos and writeups.
posts.content: This scaffold is intentionally simple. The next steps can add authentication, CRUD posts, video uploads, and a richer publishing flow.

posts.title: How Each Song Post Could Work
posts.summary: Each entry can combine a Suno video, lyrics, a short story about the track, and any release notes you want.
posts.content: A blog format fits the project well because each song can become a post with a title, embedded media, description, and supporting text.
